title: catoblastus aequalis
intro: Catoblastus aequalis, also known as Yellow Gentian, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, providing various health benefits such as relieving digestive issues, improving skin health, and boosting the immune system. Catoblastus aequalis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
